title: nauttacinv
description: Advanced tactical inventory GUI overhaul for Forge 1.20.1 with Curios API support. Features specific compatibility with combat mods like modern-mayhem and survivorsarsenal.
body:
Universal Interface: The new tactical aesthetic is applied not only to the player’s personal inventory but also universally to all types of storage (chests, barrels, Shulker boxes, and containers from other mods).

Recommended Usage: This mod is highly recommended for use on servers and modpacks that are not intended for vanilla survival. It is perfectly suited for military-themed packs, shooters, RPG servers, or zombie apocalypse survival.

Nearby Loot Collection: A new functionality is integrated into the GUI: you can now pick up items from the ground nearby your character directly through the inventory menu.
